name: Luna 10
fact: First artificial satellite of any body other than Earth. Reached lunar orbit in April 1966 — three months before NASA's Lunar Orbiter 1 — and broadcast "The Internationale" from lunar orbit during a Communist Party Congress. Ran for 56 days before its batteries died.
capability: First orbital reconnaissance of another world; opened the Soviet sequence that culminated in Luna 9 + Lunokhod.
